meaning: adj.福尔松(文化)的(福尔松系北美洲落基山脉东部发现的史前文化遗迹的村名)
examples: They love songs like "Hey Porter", "Ring of Fire", and "Folsom Prison Blue".
Scheduled to break ground this year, the Folsom Tower will rise higher than initially proposed.
The successor of the Clovis culture, the Folsom culture, is also defined by its arrowheads.
It's not every day that you see Johnny Cash sing "Folsom Prison Blues" from 20 feet away.
